title: Flea Treatment in Newark, NJ | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Newark, NJ starting at $350. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and businesses. Same-day service available.
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in Newark can be stressful for both you and your pets. Our professional flea treatment services provide comprehensive solutions for homes and businesses throughout Newark, from the Ironbound District to Forest Hill. We use safe, proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your property becomes flea-free quickly.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC serves Newark and surrounding areas with experienced technicians who understand the unique pest challenges of New Jersey properties. We offer transparent pricing, same-day service options, and a satisfaction guarantee that ensures your flea problem is fully resolved.
localContext: Newark's mix of historic brownstones, modern apartments, and commercial spaces near Penn Station and the Prudential Center all require tailored flea treatment approaches. Whether you're in a Victorian home in Vailsburg or a high-rise near Branch Brook Park, our team knows how to effectively treat fleas in Newark's diverse building types.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Newark?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Newark range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your property and the severity of the infestation. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as we target fleas in all life stages including eggs and larvae. Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours after application, and we'll provide specific safety instructions during service.

faqs.question: Do you offer same-day flea treatment in Newark?
faqs.answer: Yes, we understand flea infestations require urgent attention and offer same-day service in Newark when you call early. Our local technicians can typically arrive within hours to begin treatment and provide immediate relief from your flea problem.
